title: No Inventory Character
description: Removes the 3D-Player-Render from the Survival & Creative-Mode Inventories.
body:
### Description
Removes the 3D-Character-Render from the Inventory Screens.

This is useful if you want to A: Get more GUI-Performance, B: You want to use images in Resourcepacks, or C: Just want to remove it for any other reason.


### Before -> After
![Before -> After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a402bee57a37dfb1de6fef4db5ed957c40739b10.png)

### Dependencies
None

### Version
1.21.11+

### Source Code & Issue-Tracker
https://github.com/LunaticWasTaken/no-inv-character
